name: 9"x6"x4" Bin Organizer Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your kitchen, bath space or any other area in an elegant style with the Bin Organizer from Brightroom™. This clear organizer is designed with multiple compartments, providing ample room for cosmetics, bath essentials and other items you would like to keep within reach. Made of plastic, this bin organizer makes a functional addition to your home.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
